title: Grant admin privilege to the current user

requirements.summary: Add an 'Admin Setup' button or flow in the Admin page that allows an authenticated user to claim admin rights when no admin has been assigned yet
acceptanceCriteria: When no admin exists, an authenticated user sees a 'Claim Admin Access' button on the Admin page instead of the access-denied screen.
Clicking the button calls the backend claim function and, on success, reloads the admin status query so the full admin dashboard becomes visible.
If an admin already exists and the caller is not admin, the existing access-denied screen is still shown with no claim button.

file_operations.description: Add a new mutation hook `useClaimInitialAdmin` that calls the backend `assignCallerUserRole` method with the caller's own principal and the admin role. This hook should invalidate the 'isCallerAdmin' query on success to refresh the admin status check.

Modify the access-denied section to conditionally show a 'Claim Admin Access' button when `isCallerAdmin` is false. When clicked, the button should call the `useClaimInitialAdmin` mutation. On success, the `isCallerAdmin` query will be invalidated and refetched automatically, revealing the full admin dashboard. Include loading and error states for the mutation. The button should only appear when the user is authenticated (not anonymous). Use the authorization component's self-promotion capability to allow the first authenticated user to become admin when no admin exists.
